description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:161. let key_name = self.key.as_deref().unwrap_or("value"). README documents the no-key default of '.data.value' but the code uses a string literal in one place. If a future contributor uses ?key=value the URI collides with the no-key default invisibly. Add a const NO_KEY_DEFAULT_KEY: &str = "value" with a doc comment explaining the contract, and reference it from the Patch::Apply branch comment so the link to SSA field ownership is explicit.
title: K8sBackend type field 'value' magic string is undocumented in code
